cases.title: Organizer Admin publishes Draft event to Published state
preconditions: Existing event in Draft state with complete required metadata (name, description, startAt, endAt, location, organizationId)
EventRuleConfig present with chronologically consistent registration, check-in, and feedback windows
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor with organization scope
steps: Invoke eventService.publish(eventId, organizerAdminContext) within a real DB transaction
Read persisted event.state for the event from the database
cases.expected: Event transitions from Draft to Published; returned versioned entity snapshot has state Published; satisfies Workflow A steps 3–4 (completeness validated, admin publishes event) and domain lifecycle rule that event must be Published before registration can open

cases.title: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/publish returns Published snapshot
preconditions: Draft event with complete basic fields and valid ruleConfig
OrganizerAdmin JWT scoped to the owning organization
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId} with the same organizer token
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 with state Published and versioned entity snapshot; GET detail returns HTTP 200 confirming state Published and unchanged basic metadata per API design §2.1

cases.title: Publish event writes audit log per Workflow A
preconditions: Draft event with complete required fields and valid ruleConfig
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Query audit logs for the event filtered by entityType Event
cases.expected: Audit record persisted with actorId, actorRole OrganizerAdmin, action indicating publish transition, eventId, before.state Draft, after.state Published, and occurredAt timestamp; satisfies Workflow A step 5 (system writes EventPublished and audit log) and AC-11 critical event configuration change audit expectation

cases.title: Flow A lifecycle requires publish before open-registration
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT
E2E fixture Draft event with complete metadata and valid ruleConfig suitable for Flow A
Event not yet published
cases.expected: Open-registration before publish fails with invalid transition (HTTP 409 or semantic guard); after publish succeeds, open-registration transitions event to RegistrationOpen; aligns with testing plan Flow A draft → publish → open registration and state machine guard openRegistrationWindow requires current state Published

cases.title: Organizer Admin pauses event while registration is open
preconditions: Event in RegistrationOpen state with registrationPaused false
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor with event scope
cases.expected: Pause command succeeds; event remains in RegistrationOpen lifecycle state; afterState registrationPaused is true in returned snapshot; new registration intake is administratively paused per FR-04 pause capability

cases.title: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/pause blocks new participant registrations
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen with available capacity and active registration window
OrganizerAdmin JWT used to pause the event
Authenticated participant with no active registration for the event
cases.expected: Pause returns HTTP 200 with registrationPaused true; subsequent registration attempt fails with typed semantic error (HTTP 422 or 409) indicating registration is paused or not accepted; no new Registered or Waitlisted record created; existing registrations unaffected

cases.title: Organizer Admin uses publish and pause controls on event detail
preconditions: Web app running with organizer authenticated as OrganizerAdmin
Draft event on create/edit flow or Published/RegistrationOpen event on organizer event detail
steps: On Draft event, submit publish action from organizer event detail or lifecycle controls
On RegistrationOpen event, submit pause action from publish/pause controls
Observe event status badge and any registration-paused notice
cases.expected: UI exposes publish control for Draft and pause control when registration is open; after publish, status badge reflects Published; after pause, UI indicates registration is paused and new registrations are not accepted

cases.title: Publish transition guard permits Draft with complete required metadata
preconditions: Event entity in Draft state persisted in database
All required fields populated per publishEvent guard
ruleConfig passes chronological window validation
steps: Invoke publish transition guard or eventService.publish with complete Draft event
Verify beforeState Draft and afterState Published in persisted row
cases.expected: Guard allows transition Draft → Published; matches state machine transition table publishEvent guard required fields complete

cases.title: Publish rejected when required event fields are incomplete
preconditions: Draft event missing one or more required metadata fields (e.g. blank name or absent ruleConfig)
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: Verify event.state remains Draft in database
cases.expected: ApiError with semantic validation or HTTP 409 invalid transition; event state unchanged at Draft; satisfies Event module guardrail reject publish if required event fields are incomplete

cases.title: Publish rejected when rule config has invalid time windows
preconditions: Draft event with basic fields present but ruleConfig windows fail chronological consistency (e.g. registrationOpenAt >= registrationCloseAt)
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin actor
cases.expected: Publish blocked with validation error before state transition; event remains Draft; satisfies Workflow A guardrail block publish on invalid time windows

cases.title: Publish from non-Draft state returns conflict without mutating state
preconditions: Event already in Published or RegistrationOpen state
OrganizerAdmin JWT
cases.expected: HTTP 409 Conflict with stable error code for invalid transition; original event state preserved unchanged; aligns with invalid transition policy reject with 409 and preserve original state

cases.title: Pause rejected when event is not RegistrationOpen or already paused
preconditions: Event in Draft, Published, RegistrationClosed, InProgress, Completed, or Cancelled state; OR RegistrationOpen with registrationPaused already true
OrganizerAdmin JWT
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/pause for each ineligible state fixture
Verify event state and registrationPaused unchanged
cases.expected: HTTP 409 or semantic guard error indicating illegal pause transition; event state and registrationPaused flag unchanged; satisfies Event module guardrail reject illegal transitions by current state

cases.title: OrganizerStaff and Participant cannot publish or pause events
preconditions: Draft event and separately RegistrationOpen event in organizer scope
Authenticated JWTs for OrganizerStaff and Participant
Valid event IDs within staff assignment scope where applicable
cases.expected: All four requests return HTTP 403 unauthorized; no state transition or registrationPaused change occurs; permission matrix Publish/pause event is OrganizerAdmin only per roles-permissions §2

cases.title: Unauthenticated publish and pause requests are rejected
preconditions: Valid Draft and RegistrationOpen event IDs
No Authorization header on requests
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 401 unauthenticated; publish and pause handlers are not invoked; API auth-required principle for non-public endpoints upheld

cases.title: Duplicate publish attempt on already Published event is idempotent or rejected
preconditions: Event already in Published state from prior successful publish
OrganizerAdmin JWT
Optional Idempotency-Key header on mutating endpoint
steps: Observe HTTP status and response body state
cases.expected: Second publish does not regress state or create duplicate side effects; returns HTTP 409 invalid transition or latest Published snapshot per mutating endpoints return latest known entity state convention

cases.title: Concurrent pause and registration requests do not admit registrations after pause commits
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen with one remaining seat
OrganizerAdmin and participant actors
Two concurrent requests: pause and register
steps: Issue simultaneous POST pause (admin) and POST registrations (participant) against the same event
Count Registered participants after both requests settle
cases.expected: Transactional consistency ensures either pause commits before registration is evaluated (registration rejected as paused) or seat assignment respects capacity; no registration admitted after pause flag is true; server enforces transactional consistency per API concurrency section

cases.title: Publish and pause enforce RBAC at authorization decision pattern step 2
preconditions: Actor contexts for OrganizerAdmin (allowed) and OrganizerStaff (denied)
Valid Draft and RegistrationOpen event fixtures
steps: Invoke publish command with OrganizerStaff context and observe authorization outcome
Invoke pause command with OrganizerStaff context
Invoke same commands with OrganizerAdmin context
cases.expected: Staff actor denied at role permission validation without state mutation; Admin actor passes steps 1–2 (authenticate, validate role permission) and proceeds to transition guard; satisfies authorization decision pattern and P0 defect model unauthorized critical update prevention

cases.title: Publish audit record is immutable after write
preconditions: Successful publish with persisted audit log entry
OrganizerAdmin actor
steps: List audit logs for the event after publish
Attempt any mutation path on the audit record (direct update or delete)
cases.expected: Audit entry remains unchanged and readable; mutation rejected or unavailable; satisfies Audit module guardrail never allow audit record mutation and testing plan Flow C audit verification

cases.title: Published event becomes visible in participant event discovery when registration opens
preconditions: Draft event created by OrganizerAdmin
Participant JWT for discovery list
Event published and registration opened after publish
steps: GET /api/v1/events with participant token and optional state filter
cases.expected: Published then RegistrationOpen event appears in paginated participant event listing; publish is prerequisite lifecycle step enabling participant view of events open for registration per FR-05 dependency on Published state

cases.title: POST pause on non-existent event returns 404
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin JWT
eventId UUID that does not exist or is outside actor organization scope
cases.expected: HTTP 404 with typed error envelope indicating entity not found or not in actor scope; no side effects per API error contract §7
